title: Dynamic Programming
description: Master memoization, tabulation, sub-problems, and optimization algorithms using Dynamic Programming.
learningObjectives: Identify overlapping sub-problems and optimal substructures
Implement bottom-up tabulation tables to speed up algorithms

sections.title: Sub-problem Cache Optimizations
sections.content:
Dynamic Programming optimizes algorithms by breaking them down into overlapping sub-problems, solving each once, and storing the result to prevent redundant computations. 

1. **Memoization (Top-down)**: Solves recursively but caches results.
2. **Tabulation (Bottom-up)**: Solves iteratively, populating a lookup table from base cases up. Excellent for calculating optimal combat path weightings or inventory packing checks (Knapsack problem).

sections.title: Memoized Fibonacci (O(N) vs O(2^N))
